title: Expose authenticated cart merge API
verify: Route requires customer actor context and rejects client destination/customer fields.
Foreign-owned source is denied without data disclosure and incompatible/stock/in-progress failures use stable codes.
Completed replay validates journal customer before source retrieval and returns the recorded target when the source is soft-deleted.
Concurrent requests converge on one journal result or bounded cart_merge_in_progress response.
T3 closure includes /verify PASS, per-task semantic-pass, human checkpoint, and rollback/recovery evidence.

verify.summary: Manual T3 functional verification passed. The required packet is ready and hash-matched; linked FT-003 API/security/state specs are present; the authenticated merge API integration proves middleware registration, auth-required behavior, empty-body validation, ownership transfer, existing-target merge, journal-first replay without duplicate quantities, replay denial for another customer, pending-journal in-progress response, and stock-conflict no-mutation behavior. Backend typecheck, Memory Bank lint, strict doctor, and scope/security scans passed. T3 closure remains pending per-task /red-verify semantic-pass and HUMAN_CHECKPOINT: done.

Adversarial semantic verification passed. TASK-021 preserves the linked FT-003 API/security/state contracts: actor identity is auth-context derived, source cart identity is path-derived, client destination/customer authority is rejected, completed replay is journal-first and customer-checked, replay does not duplicate quantities, pending journal and stock conflict produce stable responses, and runtime route files do not directly mutate cart lines or source disposition. At red-verification time TASK-021 remained not done because HUMAN_CHECKPOINT: done was still pending.

verify.closure_decision: Manual T3 closure explicitly approved by the user after /verify PASS and per-task /red-verify semantic-pass.
verify.summary: GENERAL closed TASK-021 in manual mode after confirming the required T3 gates: full protocol evidence, required packet/spec gates, functional /verify PASS, per-task /red-verify semantic-pass, ROLLBACK_RECOVERY_NOTE: present, and explicit HUMAN_CHECKPOINT: done. No dependent task was promoted during mb-sync.

evidence_required: Authenticated allow/deny and request-validation integration output.
T3 human checkpoint and rollback/recovery note before closure.
constraints: Derive customer identity only from authenticated Medusa request context.
Resolve completed journal replay before requiring source retrieval.
Return sanitized stable errors and no success before workflow completion.
invariants: Client cannot select destination or customer.
A consumed source remains replayable only by its recorded customer.
Replay and concurrency cannot increment target quantities again.
purpose: Expose the security-sensitive HTTP boundary around the completed merge lifecycle.
success_outcome: Only the authenticated owner can invoke or replay merge, with deterministic safe responses under retries and concurrency.
anti_goals: Do not implement OAuth providers or login UI.
Do not duplicate Store cart CRUD routes.
Do not accept destination or customer identity from the request.

stop_conditions: Authenticated actor ownership cannot be proven at the route boundary.
Replay would require restoring or reading the consumed source.
A public response must diverge from the linked API contract.
